arts.ttl: Will Liverpool vs Man Utd go ahead following heavy snow?
arts.sum: Sky Sports News' Vinny O'Connor provides an update from a snowy Anfield on whether Liverpool's clash against Manchester United will go ahead.

arts.ttl: Man Utd pay TWO clubs to sign Victor Osimhen
arts.sum: According to reports in Nigeria, including one in ThePapers, United are prepared to pay both Osimhen's release clause in his Napoli contract, as well as a compensation figure to Galatasaray. Man Utd are prepared to pay transfer fees to TWO clubs in order to sign Victor Osimhen during the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Manchester United on 'at this stage'
arts.sum: A final safety meeting at midday will decide whether Liverpool's Premier League match against Manchester United at Anfield will go ahead.

arts.ttl: Talks underway: €75m striker determined to complete Manchester United transfer
arts.sum: There have reportedly already been initial talks over Victor Osimhen’s potential transfer to Manchester United, with the player keen to complete the move. The Nigeria international is currently on loan at Galatasaray after his surprise switch from Napoli during the summer, and it now looks like his future is set to be the subject of […] The post Talks underway: €75m striker determined to complete Manchester United transfer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Manchester United release statement after Liverpool hold safety meeting amid snow warning
arts.sum: Manchester United have released a statement ahead of their Premier League clash with Liverpool at Anfield

arts.ttl: Gary Neville's Man Utd claim continues to age like milk as pundit admits U-turn
arts.sum: Gary Neville remains haunted by a claim he made about today's opponents Liverpool and Manchester United in his early Premier League predictions, which he's since U-turned on

arts.ttl: Liverpool were offered chance to sign Man United player this summer but gambled on preferred option
arts.sum: Liverpool were reportedly offered the chance to sign Manuel Ugarte this summer before he ended up at Manchester United instead. The Uruguay international was made available after struggling to impress at Paris Saint-Germain, though he’d remained highly rated after previously performing well at Sporting Lisbon. It perhaps makes sense that Man United felt it was […] The post Liverpool were offered chance to sign Man United player this summer but gambled on preferred option appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Man United postponement latest - snow meeting, weather forecast and scene at Anfield
arts.sum: Liverpool are still due to host Manchester United at Anfield in the Premier League on Sunday afternoon despite snow falling across North West England this weekend

arts.ttl: Five records Mohamed Salah could break this season
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah has enjoyed a record-breaking start to the season at Liverpool. Salah scored and assisted two goals in Liverpool’s win at West Ham last time out to set yet more milestones. He became the first player to have both scored and assisted in eight different Premier League games in a single campaign. The Egyptian […] The post Five records Mohamed Salah could break this season first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Manchester United game subject to safety decision after heavy snow
arts.sum: Amber alert in Liverpool and Manchester for Sunday Weather hits more of Sunday’s programme in England A midday UK time decision is expected to decide whether Sunday’s Liverpool v Manchester United Premier League match will go ahead as the north-west region suffers adverse weather conditions. Liverpool FC say “every effort” is being made to get the game on. Merseyside and the north-west had a dump of snow overnight and Liverpool city council’s safety advisory group met on Sunday morning to determine whether the Premier League match could go ahead. Access issues lead the list of concerns. The group will reconvene at 12pm GMT in the hope weather conditions will ease and the fixture will kick off as scheduled at 4.30pm. Continue reading...
